rationale: Review 1 correctly identifies a real, diff-grounded inconsistency: both files define the same 'smul unfolds to evaluation' lemma but use different names (`smul_def` vs `smul_eq_apply`); acting on Review 1 by renaming to `smul_def` makes the PR internally consistent and aligned with Mathlib convention. Review 2 approves without engaging with this cross-file discrepancy.
